donor.name: driver.js
donor.localAnalysisPathNote: Temporary analysis path only; durable source identity is npm version, tarball, integrity, shasum, and repository URL.

rationale: The load-bearing Sonik seam is the cross-origin host action channel, not the spotlight runtime.
Driver.js uses direct selectors/elements while Sonik requires semantic target IDs resolved by the host.
Driver.js CSS/chrome would require theme quarantine before production use.
Sonik requires policy modes and receipts that Driver.js does not provide.
futureCopyConditions: Host action channel is implemented and verified.
Tour target registry is implemented and verified.
Native overlay/callout implementation proves insufficient or too slow.
Driver.js adapter can be isolated behind TourRuntimeAdapter without exposing DOM selectors to the agent.
